steps.title: Use the Factor Theorem
steps.content: If $f(a)=0$, then $(x-a)$ is a factor of $f(x)$. The graph passes through $(-2,0)$, $(3,0)$, and $(5,0)$, so the zeros are $-2$, $3$, and $5$.

steps.title: Convert zeros to factors
steps.content: The zeros give the factors $(x+2)$, $(x-3)$, and $(x-5)$. Of the choices, only Choice C — $x-3$ must be a factor.
